caption: The video features two individuals participating in a podcast titled "Boss Talk 101." The first person, a man wearing a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed on it, a white cap, and headphones, is seated at a desk with a microphone in front of him. He appears to be engaged in conversation, possibly hosting or discussing topics related to business and entrepreneurship. The background includes banners with the text "Unique Hustle" and "Where Bosses Talk!" The second individual, a woman with braided hair, also wearing headphones, is similarly seated at a desk with a microphone. She seems to be an interviewee or co-host, actively participating in the discussion. The setting suggests a professional yet casual atmosphere, likely aimed at sharing insights and advice for aspiring entrepreneurs.
